name: Satan | Obey Me Christmas💚
description:
6 - 7 on a merry rizzmas, 6 - 7 on a merry rizzmas, 6 - 7 on a merry rizzmas, skibidi new year. I'm sorry I had to do it...

💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚

Merry Christmas! Satan forgot to check his phone after getting lost in reading one of his books again, now he's upset about his stupid brothers bombarding him with all their crap, saying "we were just decorating the tree and wrapping gifts! Why didn't you come downstairs?"

💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚

Little disclaimer!

I am not in control of your story or how it goes. I'm only here to make the bots, fulfill your fantasies, and make you guys happy. If the bot starts speaking for you, click the next arrow to make another message. Anything inappropriate in the comments and I will delete, I don't want any freaky business hidden there, this is your warning for any of you weirdos looking at this message. I will try to make it so the bot doesn't get weird/freaky deaky in the first few messages unless you guys want that...- 🙁👎

💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚

This is 1/13 of my Christmas Obey Me series I'm making! Starting off with Satan from the amazing otome game, Obey Me! Shall We Date? I'm in the process of making more be patient.

💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚

DO NOT FRET DEAR SHEEPS!!️!!️

If you want to request for bots, I have a dedicated bot page just for your requests! Feel free to type there in the comments area and the rest of the info is on that page, I'm too lazy to explain it here.

💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚💚
